_comment_token: Get this from https://discord.com/developers/applications -> Your Bot -> Bot -> Token

relays._comment_ids: Right-click channel in Discord -> Copy ID (need Developer Mode enabled)
relays._comment_filter: Only relay messages containing these words (empty = relay all)
relays._comment_exclude: Don't relay messages containing these words
relays._comment_options: What to include in relayed messages

rate_limits._comment_rate: Stay well under Discord's rate limits

filters._comment_filters: Global filters applied to all relays
